questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有五個組織單位 (OU) 作為其在 AWS Organizations 中的組織的一部分。每個 OU 與公司擁有的五項業務相關。該公司的研發（R&D）業務正在從公司中分離出來，需要有自己的組織。解決方案架構師為此創建了一個單獨的新管理帳戶。解決方案架構師下一步應該在新的管理帳戶中做什麼？
question_text.en: A company has five organizational units (OUs) as part of its organization in AWS Organizations. Each OU correlates to the five businesses that the company owns. The company's research and development (R&D) business is separating from the company and will need its own organization. A solutions architect creates a separate new management account for this purpose. What should the solutions architect do next in the new management account?

A.zh: 在過渡期間讓研發 AWS 帳戶同時屬於兩個組織。
A.en: Have the R&D AWS account be part of both organizations during the transition.

B.zh: 在研發 AWS 帳戶離開之前的組織後，邀請研發 AWS 帳戶加入新組織。
B.en: Invite the R&D AWS account to be part of the new organization after the R&D AWS account has left the prior organization.

C.zh: 在新組織中建立新的研發 AWS 帳戶。將資源從先前的研發 AWS 帳戶遷移到新的研發 AWS 帳戶。
C.en: Create a new R&D AWS account in the new organization. Migrate resources from the prior R&D AWS account to the new R&D AWS account.

D.zh: 讓研發 AWS 帳戶加入新組織。使新管理帳戶成為先前組織的成員。
D.en: Have the R&D AWS account join the new organization. Make the new management account a member of the prior organization.

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS 帳戶不能同時屬於兩個組織。一個帳戶只能屬於一個組織，因為此選項不符合 AWS Organizations 的設計規則。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS accounts cannot belong to two organizations at the same time. An account can only belong to one organization because this option does not comply with the design rules of AWS Organizations.

B.zh: 正確。這是在 AWS Organizations 中遷移帳戶的正確流程。首先，您需要將帳戶從原始組織中刪除，然後透過邀請機制將帳戶新增至新組織。
B.en: Correct. This is the correct process for migrating accounts in AWS Organizations. First, you need to remove the account from the original organization, and then add the account to the new organization through the invitation mechanism.

C.zh: 錯誤。建立新帳戶和遷移資源是一個複雜且不必要的過程。 AWS提供了一種直接遷移帳戶的機制，無需建立新帳戶。
C.en: Incorrect. Creating a new account and migrating resources is a complex and unnecessary process. AWS provides a mechanism to directly migrate accounts without creating new accounts.

D.zh: 錯誤。管理帳戶不能是其他組織的成員。管理帳戶是組織的根帳戶，不能被邀請加入其他組織。
D.en: Incorrect. Administrative accounts cannot be members of another organization. The administrative account is the root account of the organization and cannot be invited to other organizations.

answer_text.zh: B. 在研發 AWS 帳戶離開之前的組織後，邀請研發 AWS 帳戶加入新組織。
answer_text.en: B. Invite the R&D AWS account to be part of the new organization after the R&D AWS account has left the prior organization.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (90%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：這是在 AWS Organizations 中遷移帳戶的正確流程。首先，您需要將帳戶從原始組織中刪除，然後透過邀請機制將帳戶新增至新組織。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (90%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This is the correct process for migrating accounts in AWS Organizations. First, you need to remove the account from the original organization, and then add the account to the new organization through the invitation mechanism.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在設計一種解決方案來捕獲不同 Web 應用程式中的客戶活動，以進行分析並做出預測。 Web 應用程式中的客戶活動是不可預測的，並且可能會突然增加。該公司需要一個與其他 Web 應用程式整合的解決方案。出於安全目的，解決方案必須包括授權步驟。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is designing a solution to capture customer activity in different web applications to process analytics and make predictions. Customer activity in the web applications is unpredictable and can increase suddenly. The company requires a solution that integrates with other web applications. The solution must include an authorization step for security purposes. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 容器執行個體前面設定網關負載平衡器 (GWLB)，此容器執行個體儲存公司在 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統中收到的資訊。授權由 GWLB 解決。
A.en: Configure a Gateway Load Balancer (GWLB) in front of an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) container instance that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Authorization is resolved at the GWLB.

B.zh: 在 Amazon Kinesis 資料流前面配置 Amazon API Gateway 終端節點，該資料流儲存公司在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中收到的資訊。使用 AWS Lambda 函數來解析授權。
B.en: Configure an Amazon API Gateway endpoint in front of an Amazon Kinesis data stream that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use an AWS Lambda function to resolve authorization.

C.zh: 在 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 前面配置一個 Amazon API Gateway 終端節點，該節點將公司收到的資訊儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。使用 API Gateway Lambda 授權方來解析授權。
C.en: Configure an Amazon API Gateway endpoint in front of an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use an API Gateway Lambda authorizer to resolve authorization.

D.zh: 在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 容器執行個體前面設定網關負載平衡器 (GWLB)，此容器執行個體儲存公司在 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統上收到的資訊。使用 AWS Lambda 函數來解析授權。
D.en: Configure a Gateway Load Balancer (GWLB) in front of an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) container instance that stores the information that the company receives on an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system. Use an AWS Lambda function to resolve authorization.

A.zh: 錯誤。GWLB主要用於流量管理和負載平衡，不適合處理授權邏輯。錯誤：ECS和EFS結合雖然可以儲存數據，但不適合處理即時數據流和突發流量。錯誤：該問題需要解決授權問題，而GWLB無法直接處理授權。
A.en: Incorrect. GWLB is mainly used for traffic management and load balancing, and is not suitable for processing authorization logic. Error: Although the combination of ECS and EFS can store data, it is not suitable for handling real-time data streams and burst traffic. Error: The question requires solving authorization issues, and GWLB cannot handle authorization directly.

B.zh: 錯誤。部分正確：API Gateway 可以處理突發流量並與其他服務整合。錯誤：Kinesis Data Stream 需要額外的處理步驟才能將資料儲存到 S3，且問題未提及這些步驟。錯誤：Lambda 函數可以處理授權，但問題建議使用 API Gateway 的 Lambda Authorizer。
B.en: Incorrect. Partially correct: API Gateway can handle bursty traffic and integrate with other services. Error: Kinesis Data Stream requires additional processing steps to store data to S3, and the question does not mention these steps. Error: Lambda function can handle authorization, but the question recommends using API Gateway's Lambda Authorizer.

C.zh: 正確。API閘道可以處理突發流量並整合其他服務。正確：Kinesis Data Firehose 可以將資料流直接寫入 S3，而無需額外的處理步驟。正確：API Gateway 的 Lambda Authorizer 是處理授權的最佳實務。
C.en: Correct. API Gateway can handle bursty traffic and integrate other services. Correct: Kinesis Data Firehose can write data streams directly to S3 without additional processing steps. Correct: API Gateway's Lambda Authorizer is a best practice for handling authorization.

D.zh: 錯誤。GWLB主要用於流量管理和負載平衡，不適合處理授權邏輯。錯誤：ECS和EFS結合雖然可以儲存數據，但不適合處理即時數據流和突發流量。錯誤：Lambda 函數可以處理授權，但問題建議使用 API Gateway 的 Lambda Authorizer。
D.en: Incorrect. GWLB is mainly used for traffic management and load balancing, and is not suitable for processing authorization logic. Error: Although the combination of ECS and EFS can store data, it is not suitable for handling real-time data streams and burst traffic. Error: Lambda function can handle authorization, but the question recommends using API Gateway's Lambda Authorizer.

answer_text.zh: C. 在 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 前面配置一個 Amazon API Gateway 終端節點，該節點將公司收到的資訊儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。使用 API Gateway Lambda 授權方來解析授權。
answer_text.en: C. Configure an Amazon API Gateway endpoint in front of an Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose that stores the information that the company receives in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use an API Gateway Lambda authorizer to resolve authorization.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (86%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：API閘道可以處理突發流量並整合其他服務。正確：Kinesis Data Firehose 可以將資料流直接寫入 S3，而無需額外的處理步驟。正確：API Gateway 的 Lambda Authorizer 是處理授權的最佳實務。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (86%). Popular discussion and key point summary: API Gateway can handle bursty traffic and integrate other services. Correct: Kinesis Data Firehose can write data streams directly to S3 without additional processing steps. Correct: API Gateway's Lambda Authorizer is a best practice for handling authorization.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家電子商務公司希望為其執行 Microsoft SQL Server Enterprise Edition 的 Amazon RDS 資料庫執行個體提供災難復原解決方案。該公司目前的復原點目標（RPO）和復原時間目標（RTO）是24小時。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: An ecommerce company wants a disaster recovery solution for its Amazon RDS DB instances that run Microsoft SQL Server Enterprise Edition. The company's current recovery point objective (RPO) and recovery time objective (RTO) are 24 hours. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 建立跨區域唯讀副本並將唯讀副本提升為主實例。
A.en: Create a cross-Region read replica and promote the read replica to the primary instance.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 建立 RDS 跨區域複製。
B.en: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to create RDS cross-Region replication.

C.zh: 每 24 小時使用跨區域複製將本機備份複製到 Amazon S3 儲存桶。
C.en: Use cross-Region replication every 24 hours to copy native backups to an Amazon S3 bucket.

D.zh: 每 24 小時將自動快照複製到另一個區域。
D.en: Copy automatic snapshots to another Region every 24 hours.

A.zh: 錯誤。分析：跨地域唯讀副本可以提供災難復原功能，但運作實例成本較高，不符合「最具性價比」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Cross-region read-only replicas can provide disaster recovery functions, but they are running instances with high cost and do not meet the requirements of "most cost-effective".

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：AWS DMS主要用於資料遷移，並非災難復原解決方案。雖然可以實現跨區域複製，但設定複雜，不滿足問題的性價比要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: AWS DMS is mainly used for data migration and is not a disaster recovery solution. Although cross-region replication can be achieved, the setup is complex and does not meet the cost-effectiveness requirements of the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。分析：將本機備份複製到S3是一種低成本的解決方案，但復原時間可能較長，無法滿足災難復原的RTO要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Copying native backups to S3 is a low-cost solution, but the recovery time may be long and cannot meet the RTO requirements for disaster recovery.

D.zh: 正確。分析：自動成像可以滿足RPO和RTO要求，同時成本較低，是最具性價比的解決方案。正確的。
D.en: Correct. Analysis: Automatic imaging can meet RPO and RTO requirements, and at the same time, the cost is low, making it the most cost-effective solution. Correct.

answer_text.zh: D. 每 24 小時將自動快照複製到另一個區域。
answer_text.en: D. Copy automatic snapshots to another Region every 24 hours.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：自動成像可以滿足RPO和RTO要求，同時成本較低，是最具性價比的解決方案。正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Automatic imaging can meet RPO and RTO requirements, and at the same time, the cost is low, making it the most cost-effective solution. Correct.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在啟用了黏性會話的 Application Load Balancer 後面的 Auto Scaling 群組中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行 Web 應用程式。 Web 伺服器目前託管使用者會話狀態。該公司希望確保高可用性並避免在 Web 伺服器中斷時遺失使用者會話狀態。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs a web application on Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer that has sticky sessions enabled. The web server currently hosts the user session state. The company wants to ensure high availability and avoid user session state loss in the event of a web server outage. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached 執行個體來儲存會話資料。更新應用程式以使用 ElastiCache for Memcached 來儲存會話狀態。
A.en: Use an Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached instance to store the session data. Update the application to use ElastiCache for Memcached to store the session state.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 儲存會話狀態。更新應用程式以使用 ElastiCache for Redis 來儲存會話狀態。
B.en: Use Amazon ElastiCache for Redis to store the session state. Update the application to use ElastiCache for Redis to store the session state.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Storage Gateway 快取磁碟區來儲存會話資料。更新應用程式以使用 AWS Storage Gateway 快取磁碟區來儲存會話狀態。
C.en: Use an AWS Storage Gateway cached volume to store session data. Update the application to use AWS Storage Gateway cached volume to store the session state.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon RDS 儲存會話狀態。更新應用程式以使用 Amazon RDS 儲存會話狀態。
D.en: Use Amazon RDS to store the session state. Update the application to use Amazon RDS to store the session state.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached 執行個體儲存會話資料。 Memcached是一個分散式記憶體物件快取系統，適合快取數據，但不支援持久化。雖然它可以用來儲存會話狀態，但在高可用性場景中，Redis 更適合，因為它支援資料持久性和更高級的功能，例如複製和故障轉移。這個選項是正確的，但不是最好的選擇。
A.en: Incorrect. Use an Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached instance to store session data. Memcached is a distributed memory object caching system suitable for caching data, but does not support persistence. While it can be used to store session state, in high-availability scenarios Redis is more suitable because it supports data persistence and more advanced features such as replication and failover. This option is correct, but not the best choice.

B.zh: 正確。使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 儲存會話狀態。 Redis支援持久化、故障轉移和複製，適合高可用場景。 Redis也提供了豐富的資料結構和功能來更好地管理會話狀態。此選項是最佳選擇，符合題目要求。
B.en: Correct. Use Amazon ElastiCache for Redis to store session state. Redis supports persistence, failover and replication, and is suitable for high availability scenarios. Redis also provides rich data structures and functions to better manage session state. This option is the best choice and meets the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS Storage Gateway 快取磁碟區來儲存會話資料。儲存網關主要用於混合式雲端儲存解決方案，適用於檔案儲存或備份場景。它不適合儲存會話狀態，不支援高效能的即時會話管理。
C.en: Incorrect. Use AWS Storage Gateway cache volumes to store session data. Storage Gateway is mainly used for hybrid cloud storage solutions and is suitable for file storage or backup scenarios. It is not suitable for storing session state and does not support high-performance real-time session management.

D.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon RDS 儲存會話狀態。 RDS可以儲存會話狀態，但是資料庫操作的延遲可能會影響效能，尤其是在高並發場景下。與Redis相比，RDS的效能和即時性較低，不是最佳選擇。這個選項是正確的，但不是最好的選擇。
D.en: Incorrect. Use Amazon RDS to store session state. RDS can store session state, but the latency of database operations may affect performance, especially in high-concurrency scenarios. Compared with Redis, RDS has lower performance and real-time performance and is not the best choice. This option is correct, but not the best choice.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 儲存會話狀態。更新應用程式以使用 ElastiCache for Redis 來儲存會話狀態。
answer_text.en: B. Use Amazon ElastiCache for Redis to store the session state. Update the application to use ElastiCache for Redis to store the session state.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (91%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：使用 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 儲存會話狀態。 Redis支援持久化、故障轉移和複製，適合高可用場景。 Redis也提供了豐富的資料結構和功能來更好地管理會話狀態。此選項是最佳選擇，符合題目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (91%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use Amazon ElastiCache for Redis to store session state. Redis supports persistence, failover and replication, and is suitable for high availability scenarios. Redis also provides rich data structures and functions to better manage session state. This option is the best choice and meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司將 MySQL 資料庫從公司的本地資料中心遷移到 Amazon RDS for MySQL 資料庫執行個體。該公司調整了 RDS 資料庫執行個體的大小以滿足公司的平均每日工作負載。每月一次，當公司執行報表查詢時，資料庫運作緩慢。該公司希望能夠運行報告並維護日常工作負載的效能。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company migrated a MySQL database from the company's on-premises data center to an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance. The company sized the RDS DB instance to meet the company's average daily workload. Once a month, the database performs slowly when the company runs queries for a report. The company wants to have the ability to run reports and maintain the performance of the daily workloads. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 建立資料庫的唯讀副本。將查詢定向到唯讀副本。
A.en: Create a read replica of the database. Direct the queries to the read replica.

B.zh: 建立資料庫的備份。將備份還原到另一個資料庫執行個體。將查詢定向到新資料庫。
B.en: Create a backup of the database. Restore the backup to another DB instance. Direct the queries to the new database.

C.zh: 將資料匯出到 Amazon S3。使用 Amazon Athena 查詢 S3 儲存桶。
C.en: Export the data to Amazon S3. Use Amazon Athena to query the S3 bucket.

D.zh: 調整資料庫執行個體的大小以適應額外的工作負載。
D.en: Resize the DB instance to accommodate the additional workload.

A.zh: 正確。只讀副本專門用來分擔主資料庫的讀取負載。將報表查詢指向唯讀副本，有效分離讀寫操作，確保主庫的效能不受影響。此解決方案滿足問題的要求，可以執行報告查詢，同時保持日常工作負載的效能。
A.en: Correct. Read Replica is specially used to share the read load of the primary database. Pointing report queries to the read replica effectively separates read and write operations, ensuring that the performance of the primary database is not affected. The solution meets the requirements of the problem and can run reporting queries while maintaining performance for daily workloads.

B.zh: 錯誤。建立備份並還原到新實例的過程複雜且耗時，且無法快速解決效能問題。另外，這種方條需要額外的管理工作，不適合頻繁的報表查詢場景。
B.en: Incorrect. The process of creating a backup and restoring to a new instance is complex and time-consuming, and there is no way to quickly resolve performance issues. In addition, this kind of square bar requires additional management work and is not suitable for frequent report query scenarios.

C.zh: 錯誤。將快照匯出到 S3 並使用 Athena 進行查詢會建立一個具有匯出延遲的單獨分析工作流程；它不提供目前的關係報告端點。
C.en: Incorrect. Exporting snapshots to S3 and querying with Athena creates a separate analytical workflow with export delay; it does not provide an immediately current relational reporting endpoint.

D.zh: 錯誤。調整實例大小可以提高效能，但會影響成本，並且不能解決報告查詢和日常工作負載之間的衝突。開箱即用的實例調整大小需要停機，並且可能會影響業務連續性。
D.en: Incorrect. Resizing the instance can improve performance but has a cost impact and does not resolve conflicts between reporting queries and daily workloads. Out of the box, instance resizing requires downtime and may impact business continuity.

answer_text.zh: A. 建立資料庫的唯讀副本。將查詢定向到唯讀副本。
answer_text.en: A. Create a read replica of the database. Direct the queries to the read replica.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：只讀副本專門用來分擔主資料庫的讀取負載。將報表查詢指向唯讀副本，有效分離讀寫操作，確保主庫的效能不受影響。此解決方案滿足問題的要求，可以執行報告查詢，同時保持日常工作負載的效能。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Read Replica is specially used to share the read load of the primary database. Pointing report queries to the read replica effectively separates read and write operations, ensuring that the performance of the primary database is not affected. The solution meets the requirements of the problem and can run reporting queries while maintaining performance for daily workloads.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 運行容器應用程式。該應用程式包括管理客戶和下訂單的微服務。公司需要將傳入請求路由到適當的微服務。哪一種解決方案能夠最經濟有效地滿足這項要求？
question_text.en: A company runs a container application by using Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). The application includes microservices that manage customers and place orders. The company needs to route incoming requests to the appropriate microservices. Which solution will meet this requirement MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用 AWS 負載平衡器控制器預置網路負載平衡器。
A.en: Use the AWS Load Balancer Controller to provision a Network Load Balancer.

B.zh: 使用 AWS 負載平衡器控制器預置 Application Load Balancer。
B.en: Use the AWS Load Balancer Controller to provision an Application Load Balancer.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 函數將請求連接到 Amazon EKS。
C.en: Use an AWS Lambda function to connect the requests to Amazon EKS.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon API Gateway 將請求連接到 Amazon EKS。
D.en: Use Amazon API Gateway to connect the requests to Amazon EKS.

A.zh: 錯誤。網路負載平衡器 (NLB) 適用於處理高效能、低延遲流量，但它主要用於第 4 層（傳輸層）負載平衡。這個問題需要將請求路由到特定的微服務，這需要第 7 層（應用層）能力，而 NLB 不支援基於路徑或主機名稱的路由。因此這個選項不符合問題的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Network Load Balancer (NLB) is suitable for handling high-performance, low-latency traffic, but it is primarily used for Layer 4 (transport layer) load balancing. The question requires routing requests to specific microservices, which requires layer 7 (application layer) capabilities, and NLB does not support routing based on path or host name. Therefore this option does not meet the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 正確。應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 是第 7 層負載平衡器，支援基於路徑或主機名稱的路由。 AWS 負載平衡器控制器可以自動設定 ALB 來處理 Amazon EKS 流量。此選項滿足問題要求，是最具成本效益的解決方案。
B.en: Correct. Application Load Balancer (ALB) is a layer 7 load balancer that supports path or hostname based routing. The AWS Load Balancer Controller can automatically configure an ALB to handle Amazon EKS traffic. This option meets the question requirements and is the most cost-effective solution.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Lambda 是一種無伺服器運算服務，但它不適合作為負載平衡器來路由請求。使用Lambda處理請求可能會增加複雜性和成本，並不是問題所要求的「最具成本效益」的解決方案。因此該選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service, but it is not suitable as a load balancer to route requests. Using Lambda to handle requests may increase complexity and cost, and is not the "most cost-effective" solution required by the question. Therefore this option is incorrect.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon API Gateway 是一個功能強大的 API 管理工具，但它主要用於管理 API，而不是將請求直接路由到微服務。使用 API Gateway 可能會增加額外成本，並不是問題所要求的「最具成本效益」的解決方案。因此該選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon API Gateway is a powerful API management tool, but it is primarily used for managing APIs rather than routing requests directly to microservices. Using API Gateway may add additional costs and is not the "most cost-effective" solution required by the question. Therefore this option is incorrect.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 AWS 負載平衡器控制器預置 Application Load Balancer。
answer_text.en: B. Use the AWS Load Balancer Controller to provision an Application Load Balancer.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (77%)； D (23%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 是第 7 層負載平衡器，支援基於路徑或主機名稱的路由。 AWS 負載平衡器控制器可以自動設定 ALB 來處理 Amazon EKS 流量。此選項滿足問題要求，是最具成本效益的解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (77%); D (23%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Application Load Balancer (ALB) is a layer 7 load balancer that supports path or hostname based routing. The AWS Load Balancer Controller can automatically configure an ALB to handle Amazon EKS traffic. This option meets the question requirements and is the most cost-effective solution.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS 並出售受版權保護的映像的存取權限。該公司的全球客戶群需要能夠快速存取這些圖像。公司必須拒絕來自特定國家/地區的使用者的存取。該公司希望盡可能降低成本。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company uses AWS and sells access to copyrighted images. The company’s global customer base needs to be able to access these images quickly. The company must deny access to users from specific countries. The company wants to minimize costs as much as possible. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 儲存影像。開啟多重身份驗證 (MFA) 和公共儲存桶存取。為客戶提供 S3 儲存桶的連結。
A.en: Use Amazon S3 to store the images. Turn on multi-factor authentication (MFA) and public bucket access. Provide customers with a link to the S3 bucket.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 儲存影像。為每個客戶建立一個 IAM 使用者。將使用者新增至有權存取 S3 儲存桶的群組。
B.en: Use Amazon S3 to store the images. Create an IAM user for each customer. Add the users to a group that has permission to access the S3 bucket.

C.zh: 使用應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 後面的 Amazon EC2 執行個體來儲存影像。僅在公司提供服務的國家/地區部署實例。為客戶提供其特定國家/地區實例的 ALB 連結。
C.en: Use Amazon EC2 instances that are behind Application Load Balancers (ALBs) to store the images. Deploy the instances only in the countries the company services. Provide customers with links to the ALBs for their specific country's instances.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 儲存影像。使用 Amazon CloudFront 分發具有地理限制的影像。為每位客戶提供簽名 URL 以存取 CloudFront 中的資料。
D.en: Use Amazon S3 to store the images. Use Amazon CloudFront to distribute the images with geographic restrictions. Provide a signed URL for each customer to access the data in CloudFront.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon S3 儲存影像。啟用多重身份驗證 (MFA) 和公共儲存桶存取。為客戶端提供 S3 儲存桶的連結。錯誤：MFA 用於使用者身份驗證，而不是直接控制地理存取。公共儲存桶存取不能限制對特定國家/地區的存取。錯誤：此方案無法滿足「拒絕存取特定國家/地區」要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Use Amazon S3 to store images. Enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) and public bucket access. Provide clients with a link to the S3 bucket. Error: MFA is for user authentication, not directly controlling geographic access. Public bucket access cannot restrict access to specific countries. Error: This scenario cannot satisfy the "Deny access to specific countries" requirement.

B.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon S3 儲存影像。為每個客戶建立一個 IAM 使用者。將這些使用者新增至有權存取 S3 儲存桶的群組。錯誤：為每個客戶建立 IAM 使用者會導致管理複雜性和高成本。錯誤：IAM 使用者無法直接實施地理限制。
B.en: Incorrect. Use Amazon S3 to store images. Create an IAM user for each customer. Add these users to a group with access to the S3 bucket. Error: Creating IAM users for each customer results in administrative complexity and high costs. Error: IAM users cannot directly implement geo-restrictions.

C.zh: 錯誤。使用部署在應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 後面的 Amazon EC2 執行個體來儲存映像。僅在公司服務的國家/地區部署實例。為客戶提供指向特定國家/地區實例的 ALB 連結。錯誤：使用EC2實例儲存圖片成本較高，不符合「盡可能降低成本」的要求。錯誤：這種場景需要複雜的部署和管理，並且不提供實現地理限制的靈活性。
C.en: Incorrect. Use Amazon EC2 instances deployed behind Application Load Balancers (ALBs) to store images. Deploy instances only in countries served by the company. Provide customers with links to ALBs pointing to country-specific instances. Error: The cost of using EC2 instances to store images is high and does not meet the requirement of "lowering costs as much as possible". Error: This scenario requires complex deployment and management, and does not provide the flexibility to implement geographic restrictions.

D.zh: 正確。使用 Amazon S3 儲存影像。使用 Amazon CloudFront 分發地理限制的圖像。為每位客戶提供一個簽名 URL 以存取 CloudFront 中的資料。正確：Amazon CloudFront 支援可以拒絕存取特定國家/地區的地理限制。正確：簽署 URL 確保只有授權使用者才能存取內容。正確：結合 S3 和 CloudFront 是一種成本優化的解決方案。
D.en: Correct. Use Amazon S3 to store images. Use Amazon CloudFront to distribute geo-restricted images. Provide each customer with a signed URL to access data in CloudFront. Correct: Amazon CloudFront supports geo-restrictions that can deny access to specific countries. Correct: Signed URLs ensure that only authorized users can access the content. Correct: Using a combination of S3 and CloudFront is a cost-optimized solution.

answer_text.zh: D. 使用 Amazon S3 儲存影像。使用 Amazon CloudFront 分發具有地理限制的影像。為每位客戶提供簽名 URL 以存取 CloudFront 中的資料。
answer_text.en: D. Use Amazon S3 to store the images. Use Amazon CloudFront to distribute the images with geographic restrictions. Provide a signed URL for each customer to access the data in CloudFront.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：使用 Amazon S3 儲存影像。使用 Amazon CloudFront 分發地理限制的圖像。為每位客戶提供一個簽名 URL 以存取 CloudFront 中的資料。正確：Amazon CloudFront 支援可以拒絕存取特定國家/地區的地理限制。正確：簽署 URL 確保只有授權使用者才能存取內容。正確：結合 S3 和 CloudFront 是一種成本優化的解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use Amazon S3 to store images. Use Amazon CloudFront to distribute geo-restricted images. Provide each customer with a signed URL to access data in CloudFront. Correct: Amazon CloudFront supports geo-restrictions that can deny access to specific countries. Correct: Signed URLs ensure that only authorized users can access the content. Correct: Using a combination of S3 and CloudFront is a cost-optimized solution.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師正在設計基於 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 的高可用解決方案。解決方案架構師需要確保故障不會導致本地和 AWS 區域內的效能下降或資料遺失。此解決方案需要提供節點層級和區域層級的高可用性。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A solutions architect is designing a highly available Amazon ElastiCache for Redis based solution. The solutions architect needs to ensure that failures do not result in performance degradation or loss of data locally and within an AWS Region. The solution needs to provide high availability at the node level and at the Region level. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將多可用區 Redis 複製組與包含多個節點的分片結合使用。
A.en: Use Multi-AZ Redis replication groups with shards that contain multiple nodes.

B.zh: 使用包含多個節點的 Redis 分片，並啟用 Redis 僅附加檔案 (AOF)。
B.en: Use Redis shards that contain multiple nodes with Redis append only files (AOF) turned on.

C.zh: 使用複製群組中具有多個唯讀副本的多可用區 Redis 叢集。
C.en: Use a Multi-AZ Redis cluster with more than one read replica in the replication group.

D.zh: 使用包含多個節點且啟用了 Auto Scaling 的 Redis 分片。
D.en: Use Redis shards that contain multiple nodes with Auto Scaling turned on.

A.zh: 正確。多可用區Redis複製組提供節點級和區域級高可用性。透過分片和多節點的設計，可以確保發生故障時不會出現效能下降或資料遺失的情況。這是AWS推薦的最佳實踐，滿足問題要求。
A.en: Correct. Multi-AZ Redis replication group provides node-level and regional-level high availability. Through the design of sharding and multiple nodes, you can ensure that there will be no performance degradation or data loss when a failure occurs. This is the best practice recommended by AWS and meets the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然AOF可以提供資料持久性，但它並不能保證高可用性，特別是在區域故障的情況下。此選項沒有提及多可用區支持，因此不符合問題要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Although AOF can provide data durability, it does not guarantee high availability, especially in the case of regional failures. This option does not mention Multi-AZ support, so it does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然多可用區Redis叢集可以提供高可用性，但僅依靠多個唯讀副本並不能完全滿足問題中的效能和資料遺失要求。只讀副本主要用於分擔讀取負載，並不提供高可用性。
C.en: Incorrect. Although Multi-AZ Redis cluster can provide high availability, relying solely on multiple read replicas cannot fully meet the performance and data loss requirements in the question. Read replicas are mainly used to share the read load and not to provide high availability.

D.zh: 錯誤。Auto Scaling主要用於動態調整資源以滿足負載需求，但無法直接提供高可用性。此選項沒有提及多可用區支持，因此不符合問題要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Auto Scaling is mainly used to dynamically adjust resources to meet load demands, but it cannot directly provide high availability. This option does not mention Multi-AZ support, so it does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: A. 將多可用區 Redis 複製組與包含多個節點的分片結合使用。
answer_text.en: A. Use Multi-AZ Redis replication groups with shards that contain multiple nodes.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (81%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：多可用區Redis複製組提供節點級和區域級高可用性。透過分片和多節點的設計，可以確保發生故障時不會出現效能下降或資料遺失的情況。這是AWS推薦的最佳實踐，滿足問題要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (81%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Multi-AZ Redis replication group provides node-level and regional-level high availability. Through the design of sharding and multiple nodes, you can ensure that there will be no performance degradation or data loss when a failure occurs. This is the best practice recommended by AWS and meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司計劃遷移到 AWS 並為其應用程式使用 Amazon EC2 隨選執行個體。在遷移測試階段，技術團隊觀察到應用程式需要很長時間才能啟動和載入記憶體才能完全發揮作用。哪種解決方案將減少下一個測試階段應用程式的啟動時間？
question_text.en: A company plans to migrate to AWS and use Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances for its application. During the migration testing phase, a technical team observes that the application takes a long time to launch and load memory to become fully productive. Which solution will reduce the launch time of the application during the next testing phase?

A.zh: 啟動兩個或更多 EC2 按需執行個體。開啟自動擴展功能並使 EC2 隨選執行個體在下一個測試階段可用。
A.en: Launch two or more EC2 On-Demand Instances. Turn on auto scaling features and make the EC2 On-Demand Instances available during the next testing phase.

B.zh: 啟動 EC2 Spot 執行個體以支援應用程式並擴展應用程序，以便在下一個測試階段可用。
B.en: Launch EC2 Spot Instances to support the application and to scale the application so it is available during the next testing phase.

C.zh: 啟動 EC2 按需執行個體並啟用休眠功能。在下一個測試階段配置 EC2 Auto Scaling 熱池。
C.en: Launch the EC2 On-Demand Instances with hibernation turned on. Configure EC2 Auto Scaling warm pools during the next testing phase.

D.zh: 啟動具有容量預留的 EC2 隨選執行個體。在下一個測試階段啟動更多 EC2 執行個體。
D.en: Launch EC2 On-Demand Instances with Capacity Reservations. Start additional EC2 instances during the next testing phase.

A.zh: 錯誤。啟動兩個或更多 EC2 按需執行個體。啟用自動擴展並使 EC2 隨選執行個體在下一個測試階段可用。錯誤：Auto Scaling雖然可以動態調整實例數量，但無法解決實例啟動時間長的問題。此選項沒有提及任何優化啟動時間的具體措施。
A.en: Incorrect. Start two or more EC2 On-Demand Instances. Enable autoscaling and make EC2 On-Demand Instances available during the next testing phase. Error: Although Auto Scaling can dynamically adjust the number of instances, it cannot solve the problem of long instance startup times. This option does not mention any specific measures to optimize startup time.

B.zh: 錯誤。啟動 EC2 Spot 執行個體以支援應用程式並擴展應用程式使其可用於下一個測試階段。 Bug：Spot 實例主要用於降低成本，而不是優化啟動時間。該選項沒有提到任何與啟動時間優化相關的功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Launch EC2 Spot Instances to support the application and scale the application to make it available for the next testing phase. Bug: Spot Instances are mainly used to reduce costs, not to optimize startup time. This option does not mention any features related to startup time optimization.

C.zh: 正確。啟動啟用休眠功能的 EC2 隨選執行個體。在下一個測試階段配置 EC2 Auto Scaling 熱池。正確：EC2 休眠功能允許實例保存記憶體狀態，從而加快啟動時間。 Auto Scaling 暖池可以預熱實例，使其在啟動時更快進入工作狀態。此選項結合了兩種功能來優化啟動時間，是最佳選擇。
C.en: Correct. Launch EC2 On-Demand Instances with hibernation enabled. Configure EC2 Auto Scaling warm pools during the next testing phase. Correct: The EC2 hibernation feature allows instances to save memory state, resulting in faster startup times. Auto Scaling Warm Pools can warm up instances to get them into a working state more quickly upon startup. This option combines two features to optimize boot time and is the best choice.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項錯誤：容量預留確保執行個體容量可用，但與啟動時間最佳化無關。該選項沒有提到任何與啟動時間優化相關的功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Start EC2 On-Demand Instances with Capacity Reservations. Launch additional EC2 instances during the next testing phase. Error: Capacity Reservations ensure that instance capacity is available but are not related to startup time optimization. This option does not mention any features related to startup time optimization.

answer_text.zh: C. 啟動 EC2 按需執行個體並啟用休眠功能。在下一個測試階段配置 EC2 Auto Scaling 熱池。
answer_text.en: C. Launch the EC2 On-Demand Instances with hibernation turned on. Configure EC2 Auto Scaling warm pools during the next testing phase.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：啟動啟用休眠功能的 EC2 隨選執行個體。在下一個測試階段配置 EC2 Auto Scaling 熱池。正確：EC2 休眠功能允許實例保存記憶體狀態，從而加快啟動時間。 Auto Scaling 暖池可以預熱實例，使其在啟動時更快進入工作狀態。此選項結合了兩種功能來優化啟動時間，是最佳選擇。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Launch EC2 On-Demand Instances with hibernation enabled. Configure EC2 Auto Scaling warm pools during the next testing phase. Correct: The EC2 hibernation feature allows instances to save memory state, resulting in faster startup times. Auto Scaling Warm Pools can warm up instances to get them into a working state more quickly upon startup. This option combines two features to optimize boot time and is the best choice.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司的應用程式在 Auto Scaling 群組中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行。該公司注意到，其應用程式的流量會在一周中的任意幾天突然增加。該公司希望在流量突然增加時保持應用程式效能。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company's applications run on Amazon EC2 instances in Auto Scaling groups. The company notices that its applications experience sudden traffic increases on random days of the week. The company wants to maintain application performance during sudden traffic increases. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用手動縮放來變更自動縮放群組的大小。
A.en: Use manual scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.

B.zh: 使用預測縮放來變更 Auto Scaling 群組的大小。
B.en: Use predictive scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.

C.zh: 使用動態縮放來變更 Auto Scaling 群組的大小。
C.en: Use dynamic scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.

D.zh: 使用計劃縮放來變更 Auto Scaling 群組的大小。
D.en: Use schedule scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用手動縮放來變更 Auto Scaling 群組的大小。主動伸縮需要管理員主動控制流量，主動調整實例數。這種方形、非結構化的系統產生流量快，需要人工幹預，效率低。因為，這個選項不符合問題的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Use manual scaling to change the size of an Auto Scaling group. Active scaling requires administrators to actively control traffic and actively adjust the number of instances. This kind of square and unstructured system generates traffic quickly and requires manual intervention, which is inefficient. Because, this option does not meet the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項預測伸縮根據歷史資料和機器學習模型預測未來流量，並提前調整實例數量。雖然預測性擴展可以消除流量模式，但問題提到流量增加是隨機發生的，預測性擴展無法準確預測這些流量增加。因為，這個選項不符合問題的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Use predictive scaling to change the size of an Auto Scaling group. Predictive scaling predicts future traffic based on historical data and machine learning models, and adjusts the number of instances in advance. Although predictive expansion can eliminate traffic patterns, the question mentions that traffic increases occur randomly, and predictive expansion can accurately predict these traffic increases in no way. Because, this option does not meet the requirements of the question.

C.zh: 正確。此選項動態擴容根據即時控制指標（如CPU利用率統計）自動調整實例數。這種方帶可以快速產生流量，確保高效率使用，避免過度配置資源，性價比高。因為，這個選項滿足了問題的要求。
C.en: Correct. Use dynamic scaling to change the size of an Auto Scaling group. Dynamic expansion automatically adjusts the number of instances based on real-time control indicators (such as CPU utilization statistics). This kind of square strip can quickly generate traffic, ensure efficient use, and avoid excessive provisioning of resources, which is cost-effective. Because, this option meets the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項計劃擴充根據預先定義的計劃調整實例數量。雖然計劃擴展適合受管制的流量模式，但問題提到流量增加是隨機發生的，計劃擴展無法處理這種情況。因為，這個選項不符合問題的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Use plan scaling to change the size of an Auto Scaling group. Planned scaling adjusts the number of instances based on a predefined schedule. Although planned expansion is suitable for regulated traffic patterns, the question mentions that traffic increases occur randomly, and planned expansion cannot handle this situation. Because, this option does not meet the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用動態縮放來變更 Auto Scaling 群組的大小。
answer_text.en: C. Use dynamic scaling to change the size of the Auto Scaling group.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項動態擴容根據即時控制指標（如CPU利用率統計）自動調整實例數。這種方帶可以快速產生流量，確保高效率使用，避免過度配置資源，性價比高。因為，這個選項滿足了問題的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use dynamic scaling to change the size of an Auto Scaling group. Dynamic expansion automatically adjusts the number of instances based on real-time control indicators (such as CPU utilization statistics). This kind of square strip can quickly generate traffic, ensure efficient use, and avoid excessive provisioning of resources, which is cost-effective. Because, this option meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 電子商務應用程式使用在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行的 PostgreSQL 資料庫。在每月的銷售活動期間，資料庫使用量增加並導致應用程式出現資料庫連線問題。隨後的每月銷售活動的流量是不可預測的，這會影響銷售預測。當流量出現不可預測的成長時，公司需要保持業績。哪一種解決方案能夠以最具成本效益的方式解決這個問題？
question_text.en: An ecommerce application uses a PostgreSQL database that runs on an Amazon EC2 instance. During a monthly sales event, database usage increases and causes database connection issues for the application. The traffic is unpredictable for subsequent monthly sales events, which impacts the sales forecast. The company needs to maintain performance when there is an unpredictable increase in traffic. Which solution resolves this issue in the MOST cost-effective way?

A.zh: 將 PostgreSQL 資料庫移轉到 Amazon Aurora Serverless v2。
A.en: Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon Aurora Serverless v2.

B.zh: 為 EC2 執行個體上的 PostgreSQL 資料庫啟用自動擴展，以適應增加的使用量。
B.en: Enable auto scaling for the PostgreSQL database on the EC2 instance to accommodate increased usage.

C.zh: 將 PostgreSQL 資料庫移轉到具有更大執行個體類型的 Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL。
C.en: Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL with a larger instance type.

D.zh: 將 PostgreSQL 資料庫移轉到 Amazon Redshift 以適應增加的使用量。
D.en: Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon Redshift to accommodate increased usage.

A.zh: 正確。分析：Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 是一種可按需可擴展的資料庫服務，可根據流量自動調整容量，適合處理不可預測的流量成長。它支援 PostgreSQL，並且不需要主動管理實例大小，提供了經濟高效的解決方案。這個選項是正確的，因為它解決了流量不可預測的問題，同時保持了成本效益。
A.en: Correct. Analysis: Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 is an on-demand scalable database service that can automatically adjust the capacity based on traffic and is suitable for handling unpredictable traffic growth. It supports PostgreSQL and does not require active management of instance sizes, providing a cost-effective solution. this option is correct because it solves the problem of unpredictable flow while remaining cost-effective.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：EC2執行個體本身可以啟用自動擴容，但當資料庫運作在EC2上時，擴容並不能直接解決資料庫連線問題。資料庫擴充需要額外的配置和管理，可能成本高昂，並且不是最佳解決方案。這種選擇是錯誤的，因為它不能有效解決問題，而且成本更高。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: The EC2 instance itself can enable automatic expansion, but when the database is running on EC2, expansion does not directly solve the database connection problem. Database expansion requires additional configuration and management, may be costly, and is not the optimal solution. this option is wrong because it does not effectively solve the problem and is more costly.

C.zh: 錯誤。分析：Amazon RDS 提供託管 PostgreSQL 服務，但使用較大的執行個體類型並不能解決流量不可預測的問題。由於流量值僅在特定時間釋放，因此不可用的柱可能會導致資源消耗。這個選項是錯誤的，因為它提供了不可擴展的功能且成本效益較低。
C.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Amazon RDS provides a managed PostgreSQL service, but using larger instance types does not solve the problem of unpredictable traffic. Unavailable bars may result in resource consumption because the traffic value is only released at certain times. this option is wrong because it provides unscalable capabilities and is less cost-effective.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：Amazon Redshift 是一種資料倉儲服務，適合分析工作負載而非事務資料庫工作負載。將PostgreSQL移轉到Redshift不適合電子商務用戶的交易需求。這個選項是錯誤的，因為它不適合寒冷的使用場景。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Amazon Redshift is a data warehouse service suitable for analytical workloads rather than transactional database workloads. Migrating PostgreSQL to Redshift is not suitable for the transactional needs of e-commerce users. this option is wrong because it is not suitable for cold use scenarios.

answer_text.zh: A. 將 PostgreSQL 資料庫移轉到 Amazon Aurora Serverless v2。
answer_text.en: A. Migrate the PostgreSQL database to Amazon Aurora Serverless v2.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (95%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 是一種可按需可擴展的資料庫服務，可根據流量自動調整容量，適合處理不可預測的流量成長。它支援 PostgreSQL，並且不需要主動管理實例大小，提供了經濟高效的解決方案。這個選項是正確的，因為它解決了流量不可預測的問題，同時保持了成本效益。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (95%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Amazon Aurora Serverless v2 is an on-demand scalable database service that can automatically adjust the capacity based on traffic and is suitable for handling unpredictable traffic growth. It supports PostgreSQL and does not require active management of instance sizes, providing a cost-effective solution. this option is correct because it solves the problem of unpredictable flow while remaining cost-effective.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon API Gateway 和 AWS Lambda 在 AWS 上託管內部無伺服器應用程式。該公司的員工每天開始使用該應用程式時都會報告高延遲問題。該公司希望減少延遲。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts an internal serverless application on AWS by using Amazon API Gateway and AWS Lambda. The company’s employees report issues with high latency when they begin using the application each day. The company wants to reduce latency. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 增加API網關限制。
A.en: Increase the API Gateway throttling limit.

B.zh: 設定計劃的擴展，以在員工每天開始使用應用程式之前增加 Lambda 預置的並發性。
B.en: Set up a scheduled scaling to increase Lambda provisioned concurrency before employees begin to use the application each day.

C.zh: 建立 Amazon CloudWatch 警報以在每天開始時啟動 Lambda 函數作為警報的目標。
C.en: Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to initiate a Lambda function as a target for the alarm at the beginning of each day.

D.zh: 增加 Lambda 函數記憶體。
D.en: Increase the Lambda function memory.

A.zh: 錯誤。分析：API Gateway的限流主要是為了控制請求速率、防止過載，與Lambda的冷啟動問題無關。
A.en: Incorrect. Analysis: API Gateway's current limit is mainly used to control the request rate and prevent overload, and has nothing to do with Lambda's cold start problem.

B.zh: 正確。分析：Lambda預設的同時數量可以透過有計劃的擴容，在高峰期之前預熱函數，減少首次調用的延遲，從而有效解決冷啟動問題。正確的。
B.en: Correct. Analysis: Lambda's preset concurrency can effectively solve the cold start problem by preheating the function before the peak period through planned expansion, reducing the delay of the first call. Correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。分析：CloudWatch 警報可以觸發 Lambda，但這並不能解決冷啟動問題，因為冷啟動發生在函數首次呼叫時，而不是警報觸發時。
C.en: Incorrect. Analysis: CloudWatch alarms can trigger Lambda, but this does not solve the cold start problem because cold start occurs when the function is first called, not when the alarm fires.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：增加Lambda的記憶體可以提高函數的執行速度，但是並不能解決冷啟動問題，因為冷啟動主要與函數初始化有關，而不是記憶體大小。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Increasing the memory of Lambda can improve the execution speed of the function, but it cannot solve the cold start problem, because cold start is mainly related to function initialization, not the memory size.

answer_text.zh: B. 設定計劃的擴展，以在員工每天開始使用應用程式之前增加 Lambda 預置的並發性。
answer_text.en: B. Set up a scheduled scaling to increase Lambda provisioned concurrency before employees begin to use the application each day.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：Lambda預設的同時數量可以透過有計劃的擴容，在高峰期之前預熱函數，減少首次調用的延遲，從而有效解決冷啟動問題。正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Lambda's preset concurrency can effectively solve the cold start problem by preheating the function before the peak period through planned expansion, reducing the delay of the first call. Correct.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家研究公司使用本地設備產生資料進行分析。該公司希望使用 AWS 雲端來分析數據。這些裝置產生 .csv 檔案並支援將資料寫入 SMB 檔案共用。公司分析師必須能夠使用 SQL 指令來查詢資料。分析師將全天定期進行查詢。哪一種步驟組合能夠最經濟有效地滿足這些要求？ （選擇三項。）
question_text.en: A research company uses on-premises devices to generate data for analysis. The company wants to use the AWS Cloud to analyze the data. The devices generate .csv files and support writing the data to an SMB file share. Company analysts must be able to use SQL commands to query the data. The analysts will run queries periodically throughout the day. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively? (Choose three.)

A.zh: 在 Amazon S3 檔案閘道模式下在本機部署 AWS Storage Gateway。
A.en: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway on premises in Amazon S3 File Gateway mode.

B.zh: 在 Amazon FSx File Gateway 中本機部署 AWS Storage Gateway。
B.en: Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway on premises in Amazon FSx File Gateway made.

C.zh: 設定 AWS Glue 爬網程式以根據 Amazon S3 中的資料建立表格。
C.en: Set up an AWS Glue crawler to create a table based on the data that is in Amazon S3.

D.zh: 使用 EMR 檔案系統 (EMRFS) 設定 Amazon EMR 叢集以查詢 Amazon S3 中的資料。為分析師提供存取權限。
D.en: Set up an Amazon EMR cluster with EMR File System (EMRFS) to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts.

E.zh: 設定 Amazon Redshift 叢集來查詢 Amazon S3 中的資料。為分析師提供存取權限。
E.en: Set up an Amazon Redshift cluster to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts.

F.zh: 設定 Amazon Athena 以查詢 Amazon S3 中的資料。為分析師提供存取權限。
F.en: Setup Amazon Athena to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts.

A.zh: 正確。分析：正確。 Amazon S3 檔案閘道模式允許將本機產生的 .csv 檔案上傳到 Amazon S3，滿足資料儲存需求並支援後製分析。
A.en: Correct. Analysis: Correct. Amazon S3 File Gateway mode allows locally generated .csv files to be uploaded to Amazon S3, meeting data storage requirements and supporting post-analysis.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：錯誤。 Amazon FSx 檔案閘道主要用於與 FSx 檔案系統整合。問題在於將資料儲存到Amazon S3，因此不適合。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Error. Amazon FSx File Gateway is mainly used to integrate with FSx file systems. The problem is to store data to Amazon S3, so it is not suitable.

C.zh: 正確。分析：正確。 AWS Glue 可以自動掃描 Amazon S3 中儲存的 .csv 檔案並建立表格結構以方便後續 SQL 查詢。
C.en: Correct. Analysis: Correct. AWS Glue can automatically scan .csv files stored in Amazon S3 and create table structures to facilitate subsequent SQL queries.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：錯誤。 EMR雖然可以查詢S3中的數據，但通常用於大規模數據處理，成本較高，不符合「最具性價比」問題的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Error. Although EMR can query data in S3, it is usually used for large-scale data processing, has a high cost, and does not meet the requirements of the question "most cost-effective".

E.zh: 錯誤。分析：錯誤。 Amazon Redshift適合處理結構化資料倉儲，但設定和運作成本較高，不符合「最具成本效益」問題的標準。
E.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Error. Amazon Redshift is suitable for processing structured data warehouses, but the setup and running costs are high and does not meet the criteria of the question "most cost-effective".

F.zh: 正確。分析：正確。 Amazon Athena 是一種無伺服器查詢服務，支援直接查詢 Amazon S3 中儲存的數據，並按查詢付費，非常簡單。
F.en: Correct. Analysis: Correct. Amazon Athena is a serverless query service that supports direct querying of data stored in Amazon S3 and pays per query, which is very simple.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 Amazon S3 檔案閘道模式下在本機部署 AWS Storage Gateway。；C. 設定 AWS Glue 爬網程式以根據 Amazon S3 中的資料建立表格。；F. 設定 Amazon Athena 以查詢 Amazon S3 中的資料。為分析師提供存取權限。
answer_text.en: A. Deploy an AWS Storage Gateway on premises in Amazon S3 File Gateway mode.; C. Set up an AWS Glue crawler to create a table based on the data that is in Amazon S3.; F. Setup Amazon Athena to query the data that is in Amazon S3. Provide access to analysts.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：ACF (96%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：正確。 Amazon S3 檔案閘道模式允許將本機產生的 .csv 檔案上傳到 Amazon S3，滿足資料儲存需求並支援後製分析。；分析：正確。 AWS Glue 可以自動掃描 Amazon S3 中儲存的 .csv 檔案並建立表格結構以方便後續 SQL 查詢。；分析：正確。 Amazon Athena 是一種無伺服器查詢服務，支援直接查詢 Amazon S3 中儲存的數據，並按查詢付費，非常簡單。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: ACF (96%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Correct. Amazon S3 File Gateway mode allows locally generated .csv files to be uploaded to Amazon S3, meeting data storage requirements and supporting post-analysis.; Analysis: Correct. AWS Glue can automatically scan .csv files stored in Amazon S3 and create table structures to facilitate subsequent SQL queries.; Analysis: Correct. Amazon Athena is a serverless query service that supports direct querying of data stored in Amazon S3 and pays per query, which is very simple.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 叢集和 Amazon RDS 資料庫執行個體來建置和執行支付處理應用程式。出於合規性目的，該公司將在其本地資料中心運行該應用程式。解決方案架構師希望使用 AWS Outposts 作為解決方案的一部分。解決方案架構師正在與公司的營運團隊合作建立應用程式。哪些活動是公司營運團隊的職責？ （選擇三項。）
question_text.en: A company wants to use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) clusters and Amazon RDS DB instances to build and run a payment processing application. The company will run the application in its on-premises data center for compliance purposes. A solutions architect wants to use AWS Outposts as part of the solution. The solutions architect is working with the company's operational team to build the application. Which activities are the responsibility of the company's operational team? (Choose three.)

A.zh: 為 Outposts 機架提供彈性電源和網路連接
A.en: Providing resilient power and network connectivity to the Outposts racks

B.zh: 管理在 Outposts 上執行的虛擬化管理程式、儲存系統和 AWS 服務
B.en: Managing the virtualization hypervisor, storage systems, and the AWS services that run on Outposts

C.zh: 資料中心環境的實體安全與存取控制
C.en: Physical security and access controls of the data center environment

D.zh: Outposts 基礎架構的可用性，包括 Outposts 機架內的電源、伺服器和網路設備
D.en: Availability of the Outposts infrastructure including the power supplies, servers, and networking equipment within the Outposts racks

F.zh: 為 Amazon ECS 叢集提供額外容量，以減少伺服器故障和維護事件
F.en: Providing extra capacity for Amazon ECS clusters to mitigate server failures and maintenance events

A.zh: 正確。。客戶負責為 AWS Outposts 機架提供可靠的電源和網路連接，因為 Outposts 是安裝在客戶資料中心的設備，AWS 無法直接管理這些基礎架構。
A.en: Correct. . Customers are responsible for providing reliable power and network connectivity to AWS Outposts racks because Outposts are devices installed in customer data centers and AWS cannot directly manage these infrastructures.

B.zh: 錯誤。。 AWS負責管理Outposts上的虛擬化層、儲存系統和AWS服務，客戶不需要承擔這些責任。
B.en: Incorrect. . AWS is responsible for managing the virtualization layer, storage system and AWS services on Outposts, and customers do not need to bear these responsibilities.

C.zh: 正確。。由於 Outposts 機架安裝在客戶的實體環境中，因此客戶負責資料中心的實體安全和存取控制。
C.en: Correct. . The customer is responsible for the physical security and access control of the data center as the Outposts racks are installed in the customer's physical environment.

D.zh: 錯誤。。 Outposts 基礎架構的可用性由 AWS 處理，包括機架內的電源、伺服器和網路設備。
D.en: Incorrect. . Availability of the Outposts infrastructure is handled by AWS, including power supplies, servers, and network equipment within the racks.

E.zh: 錯誤。。 Outposts 元件的實體維護由 AWS 負責，客戶無需進行硬體維護。
E.en: Incorrect. . The physical maintenance of Outposts components is handled by AWS, and customers do not need to perform hardware maintenance.

F.zh: 正確。。客戶有責任為其 Amazon ECS 叢集提供額外的容量，以回應伺服器故障和維護事件。
F.en: Correct. . It is the customer's responsibility to provide additional capacity to their Amazon ECS cluster to respond to server failures and maintenance events.

answer_text.zh: A. 為 Outposts 機架提供彈性電源和網路連接；C. 資料中心環境的實體安全與存取控制；F. 為 Amazon ECS 叢集提供額外容量，以減少伺服器故障和維護事件
answer_text.en: A. Providing resilient power and network connectivity to the Outposts racks; C. Physical security and access controls of the data center environment; F. Providing extra capacity for Amazon ECS clusters to mitigate server failures and maintenance events

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：ACF (55%)； ACE (27%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：。客戶負責為 AWS Outposts 機架提供可靠的電源和網路連接，因為 Outposts 是安裝在客戶資料中心的設備，AWS 無法直接管理這些基礎架構。；。由於 Outposts 機架安裝在客戶的實體環境中，因此客戶負責資料中心的實體安全和存取控制。；。客戶有責任為其 Amazon ECS 叢集提供額外的容量，以回應伺服器故障和維護事件。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: ACF (55%); ACE (27%). Popular discussion and key point summary: . Customers are responsible for providing reliable power and network connectivity to AWS Outposts racks because Outposts are devices installed in customer data centers and AWS cannot directly manage these infrastructures.; . The customer is responsible for the physical security and access control of the data center as the Outposts racks are installed in the customer's physical environment.; . It is the customer's responsibility to provide additional capacity to their Amazon ECS cluster to respond to server failures and maintenance events.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 某公司正計劃將基於 TCP 的應用程式遷移到公司的 VPC 中。該應用程式可透過公司資料中心的硬體設備透過非標準 TCP 連接埠公開存取。該公共端點每秒可處理多達 300 萬個請求，且延遲較低。該公司要求 AWS 中的新公共端點具有相同水準的效能。解決方案架構師應該建議什麼來滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate a TCP-based application into the company's VPC. The application is publicly accessible on a nonstandard TCP port through a hardware appliance in the company's data center. This public endpoint can process up to 3 million requests per second with low latency. The company requires the same level of performance for the new public endpoint in AWS. What should a solutions architect recommend to meet this requirement?

A.zh: 部署網路負載平衡器 (NLB)。將 NLB 配置為可透過應用程式所需的 TCP 連接埠公開存取。
A.en: Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Configure the NLB to be publicly accessible over the TCP port that the application requires.

B.zh: 部署應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB)。將 ALB 配置為可透過應用程式所需的 TCP 連接埠公開存取。
B.en: Deploy an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Configure the ALB to be publicly accessible over the TCP port that the application requires.

C.zh: 部署一個 Amazon CloudFront 分配來偵聽應用程式所需的 TCP 連接埠。使用應用程式負載平衡器作為來源。
C.en: Deploy an Amazon CloudFront distribution that listens on the TCP port that the application requires. Use an Application Load Balancer as the origin.

D.zh: 部署配置有應用程式所需的 TCP 連接埠的 Amazon API Gateway API。使用預置並發配置 AWS Lambda 函數來處理請求。
D.en: Deploy an Amazon API Gateway API that is configured with the TCP port that the application requires. Configure AWS Lambda functions with provisioned concurrency to process the requests.

A.zh: 正確。NLB 是一種負載平衡器，專門設計用於處理高效能和低延遲的 TCP/UDP 流量，能夠支援每秒數百萬個請求的吞吐量。支援非標準TCP埠，完全滿足出題要求。
A.en: Correct. NLB is a load balancer specifically designed to handle high-performance and low-latency TCP/UDP traffic, capable of supporting throughput of millions of requests per second. Supports non-standard TCP ports and fully meets the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。ALB主要用於HTTP/HTTPS流量，不支援非標準TCP埠。效能不如NLB，無法滿足每秒300萬個請求的需求。
B.en: Incorrect. ALB is mainly used for HTTP/HTTPS traffic and does not support non-standard TCP ports. The performance is not as good as NLB and cannot meet the demand of 3 million requests per second.

C.zh: 錯誤。CloudFront主要用於內容分發和HTTP/HTTPS流量的最佳化。不支援直接監聽非標準TCP埠。使用ALB作為來源也無法滿足高效能TCP流量的需求。
C.en: Incorrect. CloudFront is mainly used for content distribution and optimization of HTTP/HTTPS traffic. It does not support direct monitoring of non-standard TCP ports. Using ALB as a source also cannot meet the needs of high-performance TCP traffic.

D.zh: 錯誤。API閘道主要用於HTTP/HTTPS API流量，不支援非標準TCP埠。 Lambda函數的同時處理能力有限，無法滿足每秒300萬個請求的需求。
D.en: Incorrect. API Gateway is mainly used for HTTP/HTTPS API traffic and does not support non-standard TCP ports. The concurrent processing capability of the Lambda function is limited and cannot meet the demand of 3 million requests per second.

answer_text.zh: A. 部署網路負載平衡器 (NLB)。將 NLB 配置為可透過應用程式所需的 TCP 連接埠公開存取。
answer_text.en: A. Deploy a Network Load Balancer (NLB). Configure the NLB to be publicly accessible over the TCP port that the application requires.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：NLB 是一種負載平衡器，專門設計用於處理高效能和低延遲的 TCP/UDP 流量，能夠支援每秒數百萬個請求的吞吐量。支援非標準TCP埠，完全滿足出題要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: NLB is a load balancer specifically designed to handle high-performance and low-latency TCP/UDP traffic, capable of supporting throughput of millions of requests per second. Supports non-standard TCP ports and fully meets the question requirements.
